objective: Add cross-cutting integration tests (grove config non-TTY, init idempotency, allowlist enforcement), a naming-guard test, mcp-llm docs in README/CHANGELOG/CLAUDE.md, and bump the version to 0.3.0 to close sprint S02.

cli/tests/cli.rs: mcp_llm_dry_run_twice_is_stable (AC1b) — double dry-run writes no files, stable output key strings verified

core/src/explore/agent.rs: allowlist_enforcement_find_refused (AC1c) — ExploreConfig allowed_tools:[grep] omits find; corrective_refusal; loop recovers; answer.turns==1
